title: OptimeFlow(s) Dinámicas Coherentes
description:
OptimeFlow(s) Dinámicas Coherentes is a desktop-first, local-first progressive web app for exploring 16 × 16 S(i) coherent dynamics within the broader Coherencia Universal framework. The interface combines live numerical tables, a canvas-based visualizer, level-based simulation logic, a structural pulse mode, multilingual UI files, export tools, notes, PWA installation, and offline use.

The software is intended as an exploratory, research-oriented interactive environment rather than as a final or exhaustive formalization. It allows users to compare sequential and structural readings of the model, inspect intermediate values and associated r-values, observe resonant behavior, and work entirely in the browser with no external analytics or backend required for normal use.

The project is designed primarily for desktop interaction. Core application assets and language files can be cached for offline use through the service worker. Companion essays include Las 16 Funciones Estructurales Simultáneas (S(i)) (DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18751249), Fundamentos ontológicos y epistemológicos de la Coherencia Universal (CU) (DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18702121), and La Escala de Coherencia Universal de Precisión Limitada (DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18714577).
